final:
module top_module(
    input  [3:0] in,
    input  [1:0] sel,
    output reg out,
    input  VPB ,
    input  VPWR,
    input  VGND,
    input  VNB
);always @ (*) begin
    case (sel)
        2'b00: out = in[0];
        2'b01: out = in[1];
        2'b10: out = in[2];
        2'b11: out = in[3];
    endcase
end

endmodule
